package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_count: Services with too many unrelated dependencies, which often signals a god-service.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule181NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule181NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule181NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario181Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule181NegativeService, input Rule181NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
